notes: Game fails to run due to multiple duplicate const/let declarations (SH_CELL, SHIELD_W, SHIELD_H, SHIELD_ORIGINS, rectsOverlap, buildShields, resetPositions) in the same scope causing SyntaxErrors, plus severely broken brace structure in the update function.
The game fails to load entirely due to multiple SyntaxErrors caused by redeclaring constants and variables (e.g., SH_CELL, SHIELD_W) in the same block scope.

The build is fundamentally broken by multiple duplicate const/function declarations that cause a JavaScript syntax error, so the game does not run despite a rough Space Invaders-like structure in the source.
